3 BHK Apartment in Whitefield, Bangalore

Price ₹1.20 Cr ₹8,275 per sqft
Configuration 3 BHK
Carpet Area 1450 sqft
Status Ready to Move
Whitefield, Bangalore

About the Builder

Builder: ABC Developers

ABC Developers has delivered over 12 projects in South Bangalore over the last 15 years.

RERA Information

This project is registered under the Karnataka Real Estate Regulatory Authority. RERA ID: PRM/KA/RERA/1251/446/PR/170820/000123

Spacious 3 BHK apartment in a gated community by ABC Developers. East-facing, semi-furnished. Walking distance to ITPL, Phoenix Marketcity, and Whitefield Main Road. Amenities include 24x7 security, swimming pool, gym, kids play area, clubhouse, and reserved covered parking. The carpet area is 1450 sqft with a balcony overlooking the central garden.
